description: Root Access: terminal management, reboot, log diagnostics, system utilities.

commands.execute_shell_command: Executes a shell command (cmd.exe) in the background and returns the output.
commands.explore_folder: OPENS a graphical Windows Explorer window for the specified folder.
commands.open_program: Starts a local program specified by name.
commands.open_terminal: Opens a new independent Terminal/CMD window.
commands.read_debug_logs: Reads the technical debug logs (LiteLLM, Brain processing).
commands.read_errors: Reads specifically the latest errors (crashes, exceptions) recorded by the system.
commands.read_logs: Legge gli ultimi eventi registrati nei file di log generali del sistema.
commands.reboot_system: Reboots the entire Zentra Core system.
commands.set_configuration: Modifies a value within the main configuration file (config.json).

function.name: SYSTEM__execute_shell_command
function.description: Executes a shell command (cmd.exe) in the background and returns the output.

command.description: The exact command to pass to the shell.

function.name: SYSTEM__explore_folder
function.description: OPENS a graphical Windows Explorer window for the specified folder.

folder_path.description: The path or alias of the folder (e.g., 'desktop', 'download', 'documents').

function.name: SYSTEM__open_program
function.description: Starts a local program specified by name.

program_name.description: The name of the program to open (e.g., 'notepad', 'chrome').

function.name: SYSTEM__open_terminal
function.description: Opens a new independent Terminal/CMD window.

function.name: SYSTEM__read_debug_logs
function.description: Reads the technical debug logs (LiteLLM, Brain processing).

function.name: SYSTEM__read_errors
function.description: Reads specifically the latest errors (crashes, exceptions) recorded by the system.

function.name: SYSTEM__read_logs
function.description: Legge gli ultimi eventi registrati nei file di log generali del sistema.

function.name: SYSTEM__reboot_system
function.description: Reboots the entire Zentra Core system.

function.name: SYSTEM__set_configuration
function.description: Modifies a value within the main configuration file (config.json).

section.description: The root section of the config (e.g., 'llm', 'backend', 'voice').
